mnemonics.title: Five Process States
mnemonics.content: **N-Re-Ru-W-T**: New, Ready, Running, Waiting, Terminated. Think: 'New Recruits Run, Wait, Then Terminate' to remember the five process states in order.

mnemonics.title: PCB Contents
mnemonics.content: **SPRMA-IO**: State, Program counter, Registers, Memory info, Accounting info, I/O status. The six key pieces of information in a Process Control Block.

mnemonics.title: fork() Return Values
mnemonics.content: **Z**ero to the **C**hild, **P**ID to the **P**arent. 'ZC-PP': Zero-Child, PID-Parent. The child gets 0, the parent gets the child's PID.

mnemonics.title: Zombie vs Orphan
mnemonics.content: **Z**ombie = child is dead but parent has not called **w**ait(). **O**rphan = parent is dead, child is adopted by **i**nit (PID 1). Z=dead child, O=dead parent.

mnemonics.title: IPC: Shared Memory vs Message Passing
mnemonics.content: **S**hared Memory = **S**peed (fast but needs sync). **M**essage Passing = **M**anaged (slower but OS handles coordination). SM=Speed, MP=Managed.
